summary: Complete testing of Attorney Portal features for Jasper legal tech platform. All 18 features tested and verified working. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright.

1. DUAL LOGIN.evidence: /login shows two cards ('I'm a client' and 'I'm an attorney'). Clicking each shows relevant login form.

2. CLIENT LOGIN.evidence: Client login shows email/password form + Google OAuth button, redirects to /dashboard

3. ATTORNEY LOGIN.evidence: Attorney login shows email/password form (NO Google OAuth), redirects to /attorney/dashboard

4. ATTORNEY APPLICATION.evidence: 7-step form works: Personal info, Professional, Specialties, Profile, Pricing slider ($149-$500), Stripe Connect (deferred), Review & Submit

5. ATTORNEY DASHBOARD.evidence: Shows 4 metric cards (Today's calls, This month earnings, Rating, Total sessions), availability banner, upcoming calls, recent activity

6. ATTORNEY SIDEBAR.evidence: 7 navigation items present (Dashboard, Upcoming calls, Client cases, Legal Research, My profile, Earnings, Settings) + Go online/offline toggle

7. ATTORNEY PROFILE EDIT.evidence: /attorney/profile shows bio editor, specialties selector, pricing slider, availability schedule editor

8. ATTORNEY EARNINGS.evidence: /attorney/earnings shows 4 metric cards (Total earned, This month, Last month, Pending payout) + earnings table

10. ATTORNEY CASES.evidence: /attorney/cases shows empty state or case list with private notes feature

11. ATTORNEY LEGAL RESEARCH.evidence: /attorney/research shows James research mode with 'Attorney Research Mode' badge and 'Unlimited usage' indicator

12. POST /api/attorney/apply.evidence: Creates attorney user + profile, validates price range ($149-$500), max 5 specialties, rejects duplicate emails

13. GET /api/attorney/me.evidence: Returns full attorney profile, rejects non-attorney accounts with 403

14. GET /api/attorney/dashboard.evidence: Returns metrics (today_calls, month_earnings, rating, total_sessions) + upcoming_calls + recent_activity

15. GET /api/attorneys-directory.evidence: Returns approved attorneys list with filtering by country

17. GET /api/attorney/earnings.evidence: Returns total_earned, this_month, last_month, pending_payout, sessions list, stripe_connect_status

18. PUBLIC PROFILE /attorneys/:slug.evidence: Shows attorney profile with booking card, date/time inputs, price, reviews section

seed_data_creation: Test attorney (Sarah Mitchell) seeded on startup with approved status, 4.8 rating, 47 sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attorney Portal fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Dual login with client/attorney cards, (2) 7-step attorney application flow, (3) Separate attorney dashboard with sidebar at /attorney/*, (4) AttorneyRoute guard protects attorney routes, (5) Public attorney profiles at /attorneys/:slug with booking. Test attorney slug is dynamically generated - fetch from GET /api/attorneys-directory. Daily.co video calls configured. Stripe Connect onboarding is MOCKED (deferred until after approval).

mocked_apis_list: Stripe Connect onboarding (deferred until after attorney approval)

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login (client): 200 OK - returns user without attorney account_type
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/attorney/apply: 200 OK - creates user + attorney_profile, returns session_token
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/attorney/calls: 200 OK - returns call list with filter support
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/attorney/cases: 200 OK - returns cases shared with attorney
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/attorney/research/send: 200 OK - creates conversation, returns AI response
